inline_comments.message:
I think it is better to have multiple @Test methods instead of orchestrating everything from this main method.

You can use:

@FixMethodOrder(MethodSorters.NAME_ASCENDING)

to process test cases in alphabetical order and then the name methods in alphabetical order.   See for example:

https://git.onap.org/policy/drools-pdp/tree/policy-management/src/test/java/org/onap/policy/drools/system/test/PolicyEngineTest.java

Better to use consistency for word separation, and not use "_" to be consistent with overall Java naming convention so use instead:

PutDeleteTest
GetTest
